345 J0800B_VCL_CMPLNT_CD J0800B_VCL_CMPLNT_CD J0800B Staff Assessment for Pain: Vocal Complaint Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had vocal complaints of pain (e.g., that hurts, ouch, stop) in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
